metadata.name: Handle an Employee's Return from Leave

description: An employee is scheduled to return from a parental leave of absence.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee and their scheduled return-to-work date.

expected_outcome.value: HR specialist confirms the employee's return date.

nodes.task_description: Update the employee's status from 'On Leave' to 'Active' in the HRIS.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist successfully updates the employee's record.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with IT to reactivate the employee's system access.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist creates an IT ticket to re-enable all system access for the employee's return date.
